title: eriobotrya longifolia
intro: Eriobotrya longifolia, also known as the longan tree, is a species of evergreen tree that produces edible fruit and is native to Asia. The medicinal properties of Eriobotrya longifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eriobotrya longifolia include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential in preventing cancer and improving cognitive function. Eriobotrya longifolia can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
